nasb.text: If what he stole is actually found alive in his possession, whether an ox or a donkey or a sheep, he shall pay double.

esv.text: If the stolen beast is found alive in his possession, whether it is an ox or a donkey or a sheep, he shall pay double.

cnv.text: 所偷之物，無論是牛、是驢，或是羊，如果發現在他手中仍然活著，他必須雙倍償還。

ccb.text: 倘若他偷的牲畜如牛、羊或驴在他手上还活着，他要偿还失主双倍。
